title: Crypto Payment Gateways for Digital Products: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria or any other country with PayPal restrictions, you know the frustration of getting blocked from selling ebooks, courses, or digital templates. You're not alone. But there's a solution that's here to help - a crypto payment gateway that works seamlessly with digital products. No need for PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. You can sell online without these limitations, and get paid instantly. Read on to find out more.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

A crypto payment gateway for digital products is a platform that allows you to sell your digital creations directly to customers, without relying on traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. This means you can accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and many others. The beauty of this system is that it's fully automated, with instant payment verification and delivery of your digital products. This makes it perfect for creators who want to sell ebooks, courses, templates, or any other type of digital download without the hassle of dealing with blocked payment processors.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind a crypto payment gateway is quite straightforward. When a customer buys a digital product, they're directed to a payment page where they can select their preferred cryptocurrency and pay using a wallet or exchange. The payment is then verified by the gateway, and the digital product is automatically delivered to the customer. This process happens in real-time, without the need for any manual intervention. The Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration makes it easy to set up and customize your payment flow, with multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds that make it simple for buyers to pay in their preferred currency.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This crypto payment gateway is built specifically for digital creators who are tired of dealing with payment processor restrictions. Whether you're in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, or any other country with limited payment options, this solution is here to help. You can sell your digital products with confidence, knowing that you're not reliant on traditional payment processors that may block your account at any time. With this gateway, you're in control of your sales and your customers can pay directly in their preferred cryptocurrency.
Crypto payment gateways are the future of digital product sales, offering instant automated delivery and no fees for digital product sales.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The components of this crypto payment gateway include the Shop Engine, which is the backend that handles automated delivery and payment verification. The Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration makes it easy to set up and customize your payment flow, with multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds. Finally, the Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easy to manage your sales and customer interactions. With these components working together, you can sell your digital products with ease and confidence.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know what a crypto payment gateway is and how it works, it's time to take action. Here are the next steps to get you started: Set up a digital product store using the Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect. Customize your payment flow with multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds. Promote your store to potential customers and start selling your digital products. With this knowledge and the right tools, you can break free from payment processor restrictions and start selling your digital creations with confidence.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The best platform to sell digital downloads without fees is a crypto payment gateway like Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine, which offers instant automated delivery and no fees for digital product sales. This makes it perfect for creators who want to sell ebooks, courses, or any other type of digital download without the hassle of dealing with blocked payment processors.
Break free from PayPal restrictions and start selling your digital creations with confidence using a crypto payment gateway.
